nodes.text:
# Infinite Brainstorm — Architecture
**C4 Container diagram (L2).** How a user and Claude Code drive the canvas, and how the Tauri/Leptos halves share one data model and sync through `board.json`.

## Legend
- **Amber** = person / actor
- **Blue** = container (app / process)
- **Purple** = shared Rust crate
- **Cyan** = data store
- Arrows = call / data-flow direction; label = protocol / mechanism

[Person] User
Pans, zooms, edits nodes & edges on the infinite canvas.

[Person/Agent] Claude Code
Edits board.json directly — "anything a human can do, the agent does faster."

[Container: Leptos + WASM] Frontend
HTML5 Canvas render (rAF coalesce, culling, HiDPI), pointer/keyboard handlers (app.rs), DOM-free reducer (interaction.rs), undo/redo.

[Container: Tauri + Rust] Backend
IPC commands (load/save), atomic save (.tmp→rename + .bak), file watcher (notify) with content-hash self-write suppression, SSRF-hardened link previews.

[Container: clap CLI] brainstorm validate / query
Headless structural validation + read-only queries. No GUI — closes the agent loop (write → validate → commit).

[Container: Rust crate] brainstorm-types
Board · Node · Edge · NodeType · Camera · geometry · validation. Re-exported by BOTH frontend & backend — type drift is a compile error.

[DB] board.json
On-disk source of truth. Atomic writes + .bak. Forward-compatible schema (optional version, Unknown node fallback).

[DB] localStorage
Browser mode board + per-board camera (pan/zoom) persistence.
